name: GoldHaven Resources Corp.
description: GoldHaven Resources Corp. is a Canadian junior exploration company focused on acquiring and exploring highly prospective precious metals projects in Tier 1 mining jurisdictions. The company's primary focus is on its gold and silver assets in the Maricunga Gold Belt of Chile, as well as its Smoke Mountain copper-gold project in British Columbia. GoldHaven leverages a management team with extensive experience in mineral exploration and capital markets to identify and advance high-potential targets with the goal of creating significant shareholder value through discovery and development.
